section_title: Mode of transferring : A Company registered under any law in force at any time before the commencement of this
content:
353. Mode of transferring : A Company registered under any law in force at any time before the commencement of this
Act may cause its shares to be transferred in the manner hitherto to in use or in such other mangier as the company may
direct.
PART VIII
COMPANIES AUTHORIZED TO BE REGISTERED
